name: Yoshiori Shoji
title: Engineering Director
description: Software engineer with 20+ years of experience. 5+ years building AI products at a Silicon Valley startup, now leading global engineering teams. Broad leadership experience from tech lead to engineering management, recruiting, and performance management system design. Recognized voice in Japan's developer community — speaker, author, organizer.
shortDescription: Engineering Director with 5+ years in AI product development. Tech lead to engineering management, with expertise spanning recruiting and organization design. Developer community leader based in Tokyo.
ogDescription: Software engineer with 20+ years of experience.
5+ years building AI products at a Silicon Valley startup.
